title: Corporate Conspiracy

narrative.intro: The evidence points to a massive corporate cover-up. Nexus Industries has been conducting illegal experiments on colonists, and your contact was one of the survivors. The data you've gathered points to a secure corporate facility where they store physical evidence of their crimes.
narrative.briefing: Infiltrate the Nexus Industries archive facility and retrieve physical evidence of their illegal experiments. Security will be tight - corporate security forces are well-equipped and disciplined.
narrative.completion_success: You've obtained irrefutable evidence of Nexus Industries' crimes. Sealed medical records, test subject logs, and internal communications that prove corporate leadership knew about everything.
narrative.completion_failure: Alarms triggered. You escaped with partial data, but Nexus Industries is now aware someone is onto them. Security across all their facilities has been increased.

primary.description: Access the archive vault terminal and download evidence files
primary.completion_requirement: Two full activations at terminal (one to bypass security, one to download)

secondary.description: Complete the mission without triggering alarms

bonus.description: Neutralize the Security Chief to prevent future interference

special_item.name: Medical Experiment Records
special_item.description: Sealed medical records proving illegal human experimentation

bonus_item.name: Security Access Codes
bonus_item.description: Grants +1 to infiltration rolls against Nexus facilities

tutorial_context: Corporate security is well-equipped. Use the Weapon Table Display to check armor penetration, and the Morale Tracker for when things get intense.
